sources.title: Session 2011 Tv Xvid
sources.description: A psychological suspense drama-thriller where a psychologist becomes obsessed with one of his patients. The lines between dreams and reality blend.

metadata.Actors: Bar Refaeli, Liron Levo, Gillian Buick
